description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with ornate, fantasy-inspired detailing. The blades are large, symmetrical, and silver with a sharp, sweeping edge, featuring gold trim and a blue gem-like accent at the center. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and wrapped in dark brown material with gold bands, providing both grip and decorative flair. The central section where the blades meet the handle is reinforced with gold and blue embellishments, giving the axe a regal and ceremonial appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and display, suitable for a high-fantasy or decorative urban setting. The craftsmanship appears precise, with smooth surfaces and intricate patterns.
description: A double-headed, ornate battle axe with silver blades, gold trim, blue accents, and a straight, brown-wrapped handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing both symmetrical silver blades, gold trim, blue central accent, and the full handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same blade and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely wood, wrapped in dark brown leather with gold bands for grip, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical silver blades with sweeping edges, gold trim, blue central accent, and decorative cutouts.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with decorative gold reinforcement at the blade-handle junction.
